parsed_review.summary: CP00-831 is a Risk C, 150-unit descriptor-only continuation/bridge pack covering RP27.P04.M06.S08-RP27.P05.M04.S05 (UI synthetic/golden/evidence/review closeout rows of P04 M06-M10 bridged into the P05 fixture-foundation head M00-M04). It does NOT overclaim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, implementation_summary.production_ready_descriptor_verified=false, with descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true — the expected pre-adjudication state. Baseline matches the LIVE plan exactly: docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json packs[] has an explicit CP00-831 entry (line 397) — risk C, 150 units, range RP27.P04.M06.S08-RP27.P05.M04.S05, source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65, within_default_risk_range=true, deviation_from_plan=false — and CP00-831 is the live first/next planned pack; this agrees with the frozen PLATFORM_EXTENSIBILITY_CP831_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:235), the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, the contract latest_pack, and the review baseline. Deliverable distribution {ui:36, security_audit:12, implementation:39, fixture:35, test:10, hermes_evidence:6, claude_review:12}=150 and micro_title distribution (sum=150) and phase_counts {RP27.P04:87, RP27.P05:63} match the prompt, the requirements block (registry.js:930), and the manifest included_units; these are enforced by the coverage validator (validators.js:1207, with first/last-unit, duplicate, RP27-only, and per-section title checks). Implementation is coherent: registry.js defines binding/requirements/case-set (1406)/Hermes packet (1576)/Claude packet (1766)/closeout handoff (1892)/descriptor (2198)/contract projection (2225); the descriptor validator (validators.js:1243) enforces per-row descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no API-key/webhook/workflow secrets, no real client data/permission detail/audit body, plus no row opening runtime (api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed) and no writes (permission_decision_written/audit_event_written/writes_product_state), Hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false (gate H27), Claude packet read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false (gate C27), and closeout handoff routing to CP00-832/RP27.P05.M04.S06. NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:35) is all-false and spread into the descriptor; all CP831 symbols are re-exported via index.js export *. I specifically verified that the case-set builder passes a per-pack closeoutOverride (registry.js:1408-1419) that supersedes the shared ROW_EXTRAS.closeout_handoff default — the committed contract's closeout_handoff rows correctly show to_pack_id=CP00-832/next_subphase_id=RP27.P05.M04.S06 (no stale value surfaces). Three node:test cases (model.test.js:362/373/385) assert binding+coverage match the live plan, the descriptor stays runtime-closed (api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed=false, source_descriptor=CP830), and the contract projection keeps CP00-831 current. The committed contract (contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json) sets current_pack/latest_pack=CP00-831, latest_projection descriptor, validation.valid=true, latest_pack_id=CP00-831, and a full no_write_attestation (all runtime/write/real-data/secret flags false); scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs is deterministic (reads JSON, validates coverage/descriptor/contract/capabilities/gates, exits) with no runtime or writes. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only (Read/Grep/Glob, read_only=true) and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime opening deferred to CP00-832); Hermes is deterministic control-plane review-packet/receipt only (emits_runtime_receipt=false) and not embedded in product runtime; enterprise trust is not claimed locally. Per the authority-boundary instruction, the expected human/enterprise-trust final-approval boundary is outside this receipt and the pack makes no runtime/enterprise-trust claim, so it does not set blocks_goal_closeout. Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (readiness-report exit_code 0, stdout_bytes 1436, valid JSON result, status passed); tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob (forbidden_tools_present=false); prompt 2704 bytes < 25600 limit; prompt_contains_full_diff_or_source=false; source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used (summary-only prohibited and not used); all reviewed artifacts are valid JSON with required schema fields — no auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, or missing fields. Unrelated dirty files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html, the v2.0 .docx, workbook/* docs, docs/ldip-integration/.../c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json) are correctly scoped out via changed-file-scope.json and worktree_transition_policy and contain no CP831 production refs. Downstream closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) and review-receipt.json/raw-output.json are not yet present — the expected pre-adjudication state, confirmed against the closed CP00-830 set (which flipped production_ready to true only at closeout). One P3 informational note records that validation commands were verified by source inspection rather than independently re-executed (read-only reviewer, no Bash). No P0/P1/P2. Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack closeout or this-CP goal closeout.

findings.title: Validation commands verified by source inspection, not independently re-executed; closeout-evidence files generated downstream
findings.details: As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash), I verified the CP00-831 descriptor-only claim structurally rather than by re-running the 10 expected validation commands (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check). Structural verification covered: the frozen binding (registry.js:235) and CP831 requirements block (registry.js:930); the case-set with per-pack closeoutOverride (registry.js:1406-1419), Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false (registry.js:1576), Claude packet read_only=true/promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false (registry.js:1766), closeout handoff to CP00-832/RP27.P05.M04.S06 (registry.js:1892), descriptor with authority_boundary + NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:2198), and contract projection keeping CP00-831 latest (registry.js:2225); the coverage, descriptor, and contract validators in validators.js (1207/1243/1298) including per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution/no-secret/no-real-data/no-write guards; three CP00-831 tests (model.test.js:362/373/385); the deterministic validator scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs; the explicit live-plan entry at docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json:397 (ledger SHA 13c7ed65, deviation_from_plan=false, CP00-831 is the live first/next planned pack); and the committed contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json (latest_pack/latest_projection=CP00-831, validation.valid=true, full no_write_attestation, and closeout_handoff rows correctly showing CP00-832/RP27.P05.M04.S06). The downstream closeout-evidence files referenced by manifest.required_pack_artifacts and per-unit evidence_refs — command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json — plus review-receipt.json/raw-output.json are not yet present (only docs/closeout-packs/cp00-831/manifest.json exists; artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-831/ has no receipt/raw-output). Manifest status is in_progress with production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false, and pack_level_claude_review.status=pending with empty valid_review_receipts — the expected pre-adjudication state; the closed pack CP00-830 contains the full doc set plus receipt/raw-output and flipped production_ready to true only at closeout, confirming these are produced after this Claude review.
findings.recommendation: At adjudication/closeout, ensure the harness captures command-evidence.json (all 10 validation commands passing, including git diff --check) and construction-inspection.json, writes the hardened review-receipt.json from this review, and records exactly one valid pack-level Claude receipt before flipping production_ready/production_ready_descriptor_verified and committing — matching the CP00-830 artifact set. No code change required; this note documents the inspection-based verification scope.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; does not block pack or goal closeout. Confirms the descriptor-only claim is supported by source inspection and that absent downstream evidence files are the expected pre-adjudication state.
